description: Capability Ledger template. Standing ledger: knowledge/capabilities.json (per-repository toolchain, approved at the DoD gate). Goal-scoped ledger: .ai/capabilities.json (expires automatically with .ai/). Entries are written by the HUMAN on approving an Escalation Request (V1). The Runtime concatenates the 'allow' arrays verbatim — exact rule strings the human approved — and never translates or expands them.
